page_content: Course Title Required Courses BSCI283 Principles of Microbiology 1 BSCI412 Microbial Genetics (Lab) BSCI443 Microbial Physiology Biochemistry Courses BCHM461 Biochemistry I & BCHM462 and Biochemistry II Or BCHM463 Biochemistry of Physiology & BCHM465 and Biochemistry III Microbiology Area Courses BSCI411 Bioinformatics and Integrated Genomics (Lab) BSCI417 Microbial Pathogenesis BSCI422 Principles of Immunology BSCI423 Immunology Laboratory BSCI424 Pathogenic Microbiology (Lab) BSCI437 General Virology BSCI464 Microbial Ecology Special Topics Courses BSCI338 Special Topics in Biology BSCI339 Selected Topics in Biology BSCI348 Special Topics in Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics Departmental Honors Seminars BSCI378H Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics Department Honors Seminar BSCI398H Biology Department Honors Seminar Enrichment Minimum 3 credits from any 300- or 400-level BSCI, CHEM, or BCHM
